feat.name: Skilled Herbalist
feat.text: You've been taught how to craft healing remedies with a variety of herbs and plants. You gain the Alchemical Crafting feat, except you must select the following items to add to your formula book: lesser antidote, lesser antiplague, and minor elixir of life, as well as a fourth 1st-level common alchemical formula of your choice. You can use Nature to Craft an alchemical item that has the healing trait, rather than Crafting.

traits.name: Centaur
traits.text: Centaurs have humanoid upper bodies and equine lower bodies.
